dct_title_s: Descripcion del Reyno de Galizia : Auth. F. Fer. Oiea, Ord. Pred. A Don Pedro Fernandez de Castro Y Andrade, Conde de Lemos, de Villalva y Andrae, Marques de Sarria
dct_description_sm: Bar scale on map given in "Escala de leguas Españolas"; 8 units [= 58 mm].
Publication location and date taken from atlas.
Decorative cartouches, coat of arms, crown, angels, music, ships and sea monster.
